stemHtml:
Using the following extract from a SNOWTAM for runway 25L, find the runway third with the lowest runway condition code (RWYCC) and determine the type of contamination and depth reported on this runway third?

SNOWTAM 0125
LFPG
02170530 R25L 3/3/2 100/100/100 05/05/10 WET SNOW/WET SNOW/SLUSH
